recommendations.title: The Untamed
recommendations.overview: A meteorite deposits an alien monster with strange powers near the home of an unhappy couple.

recommendations.title: Darkman II: The Return of Durant
recommendations.overview: Darkman and Durant return and they hate each other as much as ever. This time, Durant has plans to take over the city's drug trade using high-tech weaponry. Darkman must step in and try to stop Durant once and for all.

recommendations.title: MFKZ
recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, Animation, Action, Crime, Comedy, Thriller
recommendations.overview: Angelino is just one of thousands of deadbeats living in Dark Meat City. But an otherwise unremarkable scooter accident caused by a beautiful, mysterious stranger is about to transform his life... into a waking nightmare! He starts seeing monstrous f

recommendations.title: No One Gets Out Alive
recommendations.overview: An immigrant in search of the American dream is forced to take a room in a boarding house and soon finds herself in a nightmare from which she can't escape.

recommendations.title: A Quiet Place: Day One
recommendations.overview: As New York City is invaded by alien creatures who hunt by sound, a woman named Sam fights to survive with her cat.

recommendations.title: Who Can Kill a Child?
recommendations.overview: A couple of English tourists arrive at the island of Almanzora, off the Spanish Mediterranean coast, where they discover that there are no adults in a small fishing village, only some children who stare at them and smile mysteriously.

recommendations.title: Dark Light
recommendations.overview: A woman returns to her family home and discovers it to be inhabited by monsters.

recommendations.title: The Shadow Effect
recommendations.overview: A young man's life is turned upside down when his violent dreams begin to blend with reality.

recommendations.title: Charlie Countryman
recommendations.overview: A young American falls hard for a Romanian cellist whose father has recently died -- and whose violent past could bring about his own demise.

recommendations.title: Salem's Lot
recommendations.overview: Author Ben Mears returns to his childhood home of Jerusalem's Lot only to discover his hometown is being preyed upon by a bloodthirsty vampire.
